message.content: The stylecheck linter does not exist. Fix the problem

content.content:
1	version: "2"
2	
3	run:
4	  timeout: 5m
5	
6	formatters:
7	  enable:
8	    - gofumpt # gofumpt formatter
9	
10	  settings:
11	    gofumpt:
12	      module-path: github.com/ClusterCockpit/cc-backend
13	
14	linters:
15	  enable:
16	    - staticcheck # staticcheck = true
17	    - unparam # unusedparams = true
18	    - nilnil # nilness = true (catches nil returns of nil interface values)
19	    - govet # base vet; nilness + unusedwrite via govet analyzers
20	    - stylecheck # naming conventions (ST1003: acronyms, camelCase)
21	
22	  settings:
23	    stylecheck:
24	      checks: ["ST1003"]
25	
26	    govet:
27	      enable:
28	        - nilness
29	        - unusedwrite
30	
31	exclusions:
32	  paths:
33	    - .git
34	    - .vscode
35	    - .idea
36	    - node_modules
37	    - internal/graph/generated  # gqlgen generated code
38	    - internal/api/docs\.go     # swaggo generated code
39	    - _test\.go                 # test files excluded from all linters
40

But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

file.content:
version: "2"

run:
  timeout: 5m

formatters:
  enable:
    - gofumpt # gofumpt formatter

  settings:
    gofumpt:
      module-path: github.com/ClusterCockpit/cc-backend

linters:
  enable:
    - staticcheck # staticcheck = true
    - unparam # unusedparams = true
    - nilnil # nilness = true (catches nil returns of nil interface values)
    - govet # base vet; nilness + unusedwrite via govet analyzers
    - stylecheck # naming conventions (ST1003: acronyms, camelCase)

  settings:
    stylecheck:
      checks: ["ST1003"]

    govet:
      enable:
        - nilness
        - unusedwrite

exclusions:
  paths:
    - .git
    - .vscode
    - .idea
    - node_modules
    - internal/graph/generated  # gqlgen generated code
    - internal/api/docs\.go     # swaggo generated code
    - _test\.go                 # test files excluded from all linters

content.text: In golangci-lint v2, `stylecheck` was removed — its checks (ST*) are now part of `staticcheck`. I'll move the ST1003 check there.

  settings:

      checks: ["ST1003"]

    govet:

file.content:
version: "2"

run:
  timeout: 5m

formatters:
  enable:
    - gofumpt # gofumpt formatter

  settings:
    gofumpt:
      module-path: github.com/ClusterCockpit/cc-backend

linters:
  enable:
    - staticcheck # staticcheck = true
    - unparam # unusedparams = true
    - nilnil # nilness = true (catches nil returns of nil interface values)
    - govet # base vet; nilness + unusedwrite via govet analyzers

  settings:
    staticcheck:
      checks: ["ST1003"]

    govet:
      enable:
        - nilness
        - unusedwrite

exclusions:
  paths:
    - .git
    - .vscode
    - .idea
    - node_modules
    - internal/graph/generated  # gqlgen generated code
    - internal/api/docs\.go     # swaggo generated code
    - _test\.go                 # test files excluded from all linters

content.text: Removed `stylecheck` from the linters list and moved `checks: ["ST1003"]` into `staticcheck`'s settings. The ST1003 naming convention check will now run via `staticcheck`.
